_note: test.sh is a custom structural verifier for this Dockerfile/entrypoint refactor task. The repo's bun:test suite is unrelated to the changes; tests are scored by inspecting Dockerfile.worker, docker-entrypoint.sh, and use-agents.ts. FAIL_TO_PASS lists the structural gate IDs (also defined in tests/test_manifest.yaml). test_cmd is `true` because all logic lives in the embedded Python in test.sh.
